history_text: 50-year-old female with a 5-year history of Type 2 diabetes mellitus, currently poorly controlled (HbA1c 9.1%). Comorbidities include obesity. Renal function is mildly to moderately reduced (eGFR 46.8 mL/min/1.73m²). Current medications include Metformin XR 750mg once daily, Empagliflozin 10mg once daily, Rosuvastatin 10mg nightly. No known drug allergies. She denies recent hospitalisations or surgical procedures.
